nodes.label: AI as writing and grammar assistant
nodes.grounding_span: I used AI for grammar and punctuation as well as sentence and paragraph structure

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
AI for query letter generation
nodes.grounding_span: I look to AI for help with that

nodes.label: AI ability to capture story essence
nodes.grounding_span: There's always something missing in the query or synopsis that I feel is crucial

nodes.label: User's ability to articulate desired output
nodes.grounding_span: I wish I was better at telling it what I want, what I see as perfection

nodes.label: AI for communication tasks
nodes.grounding_span: There's a right way and a wrong way to handle a difficult conversation or write a proper email

nodes.label: Creative satisfaction and enjoyment
nodes.grounding_span: I only get one chance for an agent to read my query and get hooked

nodes.label: Effective communication
nodes.grounding_span: There's a right way and a wrong way to handle a difficult conversation or write a proper email

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's inability to capture essence
nodes.grounding_span: There's always something missing in the query or synopsis that I feel is crucial

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: It's great fun to see how it produces something so close to what I imagine

nodes.label: Desire for AI to admit uncertainty
nodes.grounding_span: I wish I was better at telling it what I want

nodes.label: Confidence in recognizing ideal output
nodes.grounding_span: I think I'd know it if I saw it

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: I go a couple of rounds like that and then quit to try another day

nodes.label: Analytical self-reflection on communication with AI
nodes.grounding_span: Maybe there's information that I'm not supplying properly or I could be over analyzing it
